name: deterministic-agent-system
description: Deterministic agent system with auditable and replayable execution

scripts.verify:ci-local: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true}); console.log('dist cleaned')" && npm run build && npm test
scripts.test:http: node tests/http.execute.test.js && node tests/http.negative.test.js && node tests/http.simulate.test.js && node tests/http.simulate-model.test.js && node tests/http.health-and-requestid.test.js && node tests/http.tool-execute.test.js
scripts.dev: npm run build && node dist/src/index.js serve
scripts.test:baseline:contractual: npx vitest run tests/entity-extractor/entity-extractor.test.ts tests/customer-service-agent/customer-service-agent.test.ts tests/customer-service-api/customer-service-api.test.ts tests/customer-service-api/customer-service-api-session.test.ts tests/customer-service/customer-service-semantic-invariants.test.ts tests/channels/whatsapp.store.test.ts tests/channels/whatsapp.store-sqlite.test.ts tests/channels/whatsapp.store-factory.test.ts tests/channels/whatsapp.store-async.test.ts tests/channels/whatsapp.runtime.test.ts tests/channels/whatsapp.client.test.ts tests/channels/whatsapp.send.test.ts tests/channels/whatsapp.normalize.test.ts tests/channels/whatsapp.agent-bridge.test.ts tests/channels/whatsapp-webhook-handler.test.ts tests/insurance/coverage-explainer.test.ts tests/insurance/policy-repository.test.ts tests/insurance/coverage-service.test.ts tests/insurance/coverage-response-formatter.test.ts tests/insurance/coverage-query-facade.test.ts tests/storage/postgres-config.test.ts
scripts.test: node tests/core.bounded-loop.test.js && node tests/agent.executor.test.js && node tests/agent.replay.e2e.test.js && node tests/agent.determinism.snapshot.test.js && node tests/tool.executor.test.js && node tests/http.execute.test.js && node tests/http.negative.test.js && node tests/http.simulate.test.js && node tests/http.simulate-model.test.js && node tests/http.health-and-requestid.test.js && node tests/http.tool-execute.test.js && node tests/openai-compatible.adapter.test.js && node tests/planner.llm-live.parse.test.js && node tests/http.agent-run.llm-live.test.js && node tests/http.agent-run.llm-live.normalize.test.js && node tests/http.agent-run.llm-live.extract.test.js && node tests/http.agent-run.llm-live.extract-chain.test.js && node tests/http.agent-run.llm-live.openai-compatible.stub.test.js && node tests/http.agent-run.llm-mock.extract-chain.test.js && node tests/agent.plan.refs.test.js && node tests/agent.tools.json-select-keys.test.js && node tests/agent.tools.catalog.test.js && node tests/agent.tools.json-merge.test.js && node tests/http.agent-run.llm-live.extract-merge.test.js && node tests/http.agent-run.llm-mock.extract-merge.test.js && node tests/agent.tools.capability-selector.test.js && node tests/planner.capability-selection.test.js && node tests/http.tools.contract.test.js && node tests/agent.capability-synthesis.test.js && node tests/planner.capability-synthesis.pipeline.test.js && node tests/http.agent-run.llm-live.cap-synth.test.js && node tests/http.agent-run.llm-mock.cap-synth.test.js && node tests/model-adapter-factory.test.js && node tests/demo.llm-live-real.test.js && npm run test:runs
scripts.verify: npm run verify:bootstrap && npm run verify:contracts
scripts.demo:tools: node -e "(async()=>{const {startServer}=require('./dist/src/http/server');const r=await startServer({port:0});const base='http://127.0.0.1:'+r.port;const res=await fetch(base+'/tools');console.log(await res.text());await r.close();})().catch(e=>{console.error(e);process.exit(1);});"
scripts.demo:capabilities: node -e "(async()=>{const {startServer}=require('./dist/src/http/server');const r=await startServer({port:0});const base='http://127.0.0.1:'+r.port;const res=await fetch(base+'/agent/capabilities');console.log(await res.text());await r.close();})().catch(e=>{console.error(e);process.exit(1);});"
scripts.demo:agent:llm-mock: node -e "(async()=>{const {startServer}=require('./dist/src/http/server');const r=await startServer({port:0});const base='http://127.0.0.1:'+r.port;const body={goal:'sum 2 3',demo:'core',mode:'mock',planner:'llm-mock',maxSteps:12,traceId:'demo-llm-mock-001'};const res=await fetch(base+'/agent/run',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(body)});console.log(await res.text());await r.close();})().catch(e=>{console.error(e);process.exit(1);});"
scripts.demo:agent:llm-live: node -e "(async()=>{const {startServer}=require('./dist/src/http/server');const r=await startServer({port:0});const base='http://127.0.0.1:'+r.port;const body={goal:'sum 2 3',demo:'core',mode:'mock',planner:'llm-live',llmProvider:'mock',maxSteps:12,traceId:'demo-llm-live-001'};const res=await fetch(base+'/agent/run',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(body)});console.log(await res.text());await r.close();})().catch(e=>{console.error(e);process.exit(1);});"
scripts.demo:agent:llm-live:extract-chain: node -e "(async()=>{const {startServer}=require('./dist/src/http/server');const r=await startServer({port:0});const base='http://127.0.0.1:'+r.port;const body={goal:'extract normalized user name from json',demo:'core',mode:'mock',planner:'llm-live',llmProvider:'mock',maxSteps:12,traceId:'demo-llm-live-extract-chain-001'};const res=await fetch(base+'/agent/run',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(body)});console.log(await res.text());await r.close();})().catch(e=>{console.error(e);process.exit(1);});"
scripts.demo:agent:tool-loop: node -e "(async()=>{const {startServer}=require('./dist/src/http/server');const r=await startServer({port:0});const base='http://127.0.0.1:'+r.port;const body={goal:'loop add 1 2',demo:'core',mode:'mock',planner:'det-tools',maxSteps:12,traceId:'demo-tool-loop-001'};const res=await fetch(base+'/agent/run',{method:'POST',headers:{'content-type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(body)});console.log(await res.text());await r.close();})().catch(e=>{console.error(e);process.exit(1);});"
scripts.test:runs: node tests/http.runs.test.js && node tests/http.runs.get.notfound.test.js && node tests/http.runs.start.badbody.test.js && node tests/http.runs.start.notfound.test.js && node tests/http.runs.start.twice.test.js && node tests/http.runs.start.idempotency.test.js && node tests/http.runs.start.cancelled.test.js && node tests/http.runs.execute.test.js && node tests/http.runs.execute.cancelled.test.js && node tests/http.runs.execute.selfhealing.test.js && node tests/http.runs.complete.notfound.test.js && node tests/http.runs.complete.from-created.test.js && node tests/http.runs.complete.requires-running.test.js && node tests/http.runs.complete.cancelled.test.js && node tests/http.runs.fail.notfound.test.js && node tests/http.runs.fail.from-created.test.js && node tests/http.runs.fail.requires-running.test.js && node tests/http.runs.fail.cancelled.test.js && node tests/http.runs.cancel.test.js && node tests/http.runs.cancel.badbody.test.js && node tests/http.runs.cancel.notfound.test.js && node tests/http.runs.cancel.persisted.test.js && node tests/http.runs.cancel.from-running.persisted.test.js && node tests/http.runs.cancel.transitions.test.js && node tests/http.runs.cancel.completed.test.js && node tests/http.runs.sandbox.test.js
scripts.demo:payment-audit:customer: node -e "const {runCustomerServiceApi}=require('./dist/src/customer-service-api/customer-service-api'); console.log(JSON.stringify(runCustomerServiceApi({sessionId:'demo-payment-audit-customer-001',businessContextId:'customer-service-payment-audit-v1',userMessageText:'Show me the payment history for customer CUS-101'}), null, 2));"
